title: Organizational cyber preparedness for the Post-Quantum Age (INCD landing page)
description: Israel National Cyber Directorate directory page collecting its guidance on organizational cyber readiness for the post-quantum era.

title: Organizational Cyber Readiness for the Post-Quantum Age (Hebrew PDF, v.1.85)
description: INCD Hebrew best-practices document on organizational cyber readiness to the post-quantum age, addressing the quantum threat to encryption and recommended preparedness steps.

title: Best Practices - Organizational Cyber Readiness to the Post-Quantum Age (English PDF, v.1.85)
description: INCD English best-practices document recommending courses of action for organizational cyber readiness to the post-quantum age, covering quantum-computing threats to current encryption.

title: Bank of Israel Banking Supervision letter on banking system preparedness for the quantum computing era (English)
description: January 7, 2025 supervisory letter from the Banking Supervision Department to banking corporations on preparing for the quantum computing era, including migration to post-quantum (quantum-resistant) encryption and cryptographic inventory mapping.

title: Bank of Israel Banking Supervision letter on banking system preparedness for the quantum computing era (Hebrew)
description: Hebrew version of the January 7, 2025 Banking Supervision supervisory letter to banking corporations on preparedness for quantum computing and migration to post-quantum encryption.

title: Israel National Cyber Security Strategy 2025
description: INCD national cybersecurity strategy published February 2025; PQC mention not confirmed in available search snippets.

title: Israel ramps up encryption efforts / National Digital Agency directive to government bodies (journalism)
description: Ynet news report that Israel's National Digital Agency instructed government bodies to require post-quantum encryption in new vendor contracts and complete a quantum threat assessment by end of 2025. No official source URL located.
